title: TestPlan
description: Schema for the test-plan.json artifact produced by the orchestrator.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of artifact generation.

mode.description: Orchestrator run mode (e.g. mcp-smoke, bootstrap, mcp-integration).

goal.description: Human-readable goal string passed to the orchestrator.

target_repo.description: GitHub repository slug for the target repo (owner/repo).

target_branch.description: Git branch the orchestrator is operating against.

actions.description: List of action names planned for this run.

writes_planned.description: Whether any file writes are planned.

auto_merge.description: Whether auto-merge will be performed (always false per policy).
